method.env: shared-KV sparse MLA, LI triton_tl_dot, MORI+AITER routed padded MoE backward, Triton SwiGLU owner-rank VJP, full activation checkpointing, checkpoint disabled
method.runtime: direct TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4-Flash 4-layer BF16 full training run
method.trace_read: User-scope durations are CPU/launch-region wall durations summed across all profiled microsteps and checkpoint recomputes. CPU op durations are exact op-name inclusive durations and can overlap/nest. Kernel-name-class durations are summed GPU kernel dispatch durations by kernel name, not wall-clock critical-path time. Rank max is the gating rank view.
